code: const AUTH_STORAGE_KEY='aipa_auth';export function getStoredAuth(){const raw=localStorage.getItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);if(!raw)return null;try{return JSON.parse(raw);}catch(_error){localStorage.removeItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);return null;}}export function setStoredAuth(auth){localStorage.setItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY,JSON.stringify(auth));}export function clearStoredAuth(){localStorage.removeItem(AUTH_STORAGE_KEY);}
